facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 244 reviews. One bowl of pho in Phu Quoc.

Phở Vương Phú Quốc sits at 70 Đ. 30 Tháng 4 and the locals keep coming back. Rich broth, real depth, the kind of bowl that makes you order a second before you finish the first.

Not a resort restaurant. Not a tourist trap. Just pho done right.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Watch that broth hit the bowl. Phở Vương Phú Quốc, 4.9 stars, 244 reviews. This is what locals eat for breakfast on the island. Address in bio.

4.9 stars. 244 reviews. One bowl at Phở Vương Phú Quốc.

Broth this deep takes hours. Worth every minute.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
instagram.video_caption: Locals line up. 4.9 stars. Phở Vương Phú Quốc delivers every time. Don't skip breakfast on the island.
